boundary_binding.action_boundary: AP may execute only if callback provenance is current and matched to vendor master contact
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No current source record closes the exact boundary before execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-CTL says the required callback-log dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The controlling control record says the callback dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or tied to a different action, and policy requires current source records to close the boundary before execution. History, urgency, or prior paperwork do not authorize release. Escalate for callback provenance resolution and exact match to the vendor master contact.
open_blockers: callback log must match authorized contact and action
